activities_projects.title: Fern Fractal Observation
steps: Observe the fern leaf carefully
Notice how smaller leaves look like the whole leaf
Draw the fern pattern in your notebook
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of drawing and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sierpinski Carpet Drawing
steps: Draw a square and divide it into 9 equal squares
Remove the middle square
Repeat the process for the remaining squares till Step 2
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of steps and drawing (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sierpinski Triangle Activity
steps: Draw an equilateral triangle
Join midpoints of each side
Remove the middle triangle and repeat once more

activities_projects.title: Koch Snowflake Construction
steps: Draw an equilateral triangle
Divide each side into three equal parts
Construct a small triangle on the middle segment

activities_projects.title: Solid Shape Identification
steps: List common solids like cube, cuboid, cone, and cylinder
Draw each shape
Label faces, edges, and vertices

activities_projects.title: Cube Net Making
steps: Draw a net of a cube with six squares
Cut the net carefully
Fold and glue to form a cube

activities_projects.title: Cylinder Net Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the net of a cylinder
steps: Draw a rectangle and two circles
Cut them out
Join them to form a cylinder
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Visualises transformation from flat shapes to solids

activities_projects.title: Shadow Observation
steps: Place an object near a wall
Shine a torch on it
Observe and draw the shadow shape

activities_projects.title: Top–Front–Side View Drawing
steps: Place a cube on the table
Draw its top view
Draw its front and side views

activities_projects.title: Isometric Grid Drawing
steps: Draw a cube on the isometric grid
Extend the drawing to make two joined cubes
Shade the visible faces
